calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Short Cause Trial sent forthwith from Department 501.

Dept.505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Cristobal; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:10:16 a.m. and concluding at 10:16:08 a.m.(D505)

Howard Olsen, Esq. representing Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic.
Defendant Elisa Linarez-Salami not appearing.
Grace Wong, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer filed Feb-07-2024.
Answer filed by Defendant Elisa Linarez-Salami filed on Feb-15-2024.
Proof of personal service of complaint and summons as to Defendant Elisa Linarez-Salami on Feb-08-2024.
Dismissal of Defendants Does 1 to 10 entered on Mar-05-2024
Notice of time and place of trial filed and sent on Mar-08-2024.

Counsel to summarize the case and to offer proof as to witness testimony.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Lease agreement
Exhibit 2: Grant agreement
Exhibit 3: Incident Report
Exhibit 4: Violation Notices
Exhibit 5: Final Warning Notice
Exhibit 6: 3 day notice to quit

The Court examines witness. Witness confirms that exhibits and declarations are true and correct.

The Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case. The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover possession of the premises located at
405 Valencia Street #214
City & County of San Francisco CA 94103

Proposed Judgment signed and executed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2024 Off Calendar
